success_surface: Complex multi-condition spreadsheet manipulation with boundary detection, pattern recognition, and state preservation.
effective_behaviors: Explored spreadsheet structure programmatically before writing solution code
Inspected multiple sheets to confirm actual sheet names match expectations
Sampled data rows iteratively to understand header/index patterns
Implemented step-by-step operations with intermediate logging for validation
Detected structural boundaries using pattern matching on cell values
Checked stopping conditions before propagating values forward
Validated output against target range before final file save
Used conditional logic to distinguish between propagatable values and structural anchors
Preserved original workbook by saving to new file path
evidence: Agent ran exploratory code to list wb.sheetnames and inspect first 10 rows of each sheet before implementing solution
Agent displayed detailed view of rows 1-40 to identify header rows (containing 'column', 'xxx') and index patterns (0002, 0004)
Solution code included explicit Step 1/Step 2/Step 3 structure with print statements after each operation
Agent defined is_index_or_header() function with regex pattern ^0\d+$ and substring checks for header detection
Propagating loop checked col_f_value is None before continuing fill_zone logic
Validation section explicitly showed results for answer_position range (A3:F36) confirming correct behavior
File saved to output_path, leaving source file untouched per best practices

memory_items.title: Pre-Code Structure Discovery
memory_items.lesson: Always programmatically inspect workbook structure before writing manipulation code
memory_items.generalization: List sheet names (wb.sheetnames), check max_row/max_col, and sample representative rows to identify data patterns, headers, and anchor points before implementing transformations.

memory_items.title: Step-Wise Operation Implementation
memory_items.lesson: Break complex manipulations into discrete numbered steps with logging
memory_items.generalization: Implement each logical operation separately, add print statements at entry and exit of each step, and track counts of cells affected to enable debugging and verification.

memory_items.title: Boundary Detection for Value Propagation
memory_items.lesson: Define explicit stopping conditions and value type filters for forward-fill operations
memory_items.generalization: When propagating values downward or rightward, detect structural boundaries (headers, indices, empty sentinel cells) using pattern matching; stop propagation when boundary or empty sentinel is encountered.

memory_items.title: Target Range Validation Before Save
memory_items.lesson: Verify output matches expected results in the designated answer range before finalizing
memory_items.generalization: After manipulating data, display contents of the specified answer_position range to confirm correctness before saving the workbook.

edits.content:
## 6. Trace-Derived Lessons
- **Pre-Code Structure Discovery**: Always programmatically inspect workbook structure before writing manipulation code. List sheet names (wb.sheetnames), check max_row/max_col, and sample representative rows to identify data patterns, headers, and anchor points before implementing transformations.
- **Step-Wise Operation Implementation**: Break complex manipulations into discrete numbered steps with logging. Implement each logical operation separately, add print statements at entry and exit of each step, and track counts of cells affected to enable debugging and verification.
- **Boundary Detection for Value Propagation**: Define explicit stopping conditions and value type filters for forward-fill operations. When propagating values downward or rightward, detect structural boundaries (headers, indices, empty sentinel cells) using pattern matching; stop propagation when boundary or empty sentinel is encountered.
- **Target Range Validation Before Save**: After manipulating data, display contents of the specified answer_position range to confirm correctness before saving the workbook.
